features: INTENSE FRESHNESS FOR UP TO 12 HOURS*
Closeup Gel Toothpaste gives you fresh breath* and whitens teeth.
The active mouthwash formula with zinc fights bad breath, giving you up to 12 hours of fresh breath.^
The micro sparkle crystals give you a bright white smile with each brush.
* In vivo study with reduced bad breath after 4 weeks of regular use
description: Product Description Closeup Everfresh Menthol Paradise Toothpaste 90g Directions Apply a pea-sized amount of Close Up Menthol Paradise toothpaste to a toothbrush and brush thoroughly for 2 minutes at least twice a day. Safety Warning For outdoor use. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. Discontinue use if irritation occurs and consult a dentist. See more
